settings.heading: Blackout was born from getting back up.
settings.description: Four spinal surgeries. A military career. A choice to come back through training instead of walking away from it. That's why Blackout exists.

settings.content_heading: Built by someone who had to rebuild himself.
settings.content_text: The founder of Blackout Performance Labs served in the military. After his service, degenerative spinal stenosis led to four surgeries over five years. Most people at that point stop training. He didn't. He came back through disciplined, tactical fitness — and when he looked for supplements that matched that standard, he couldn't find them. Everything on the shelf was underdosed, overmarketed, or hiding its formula behind 'proprietary blends.' So he built Blackout. US-made. Full ingredient disclosure. Clinical doses. Built for people who take their training seriously — whether you're active duty, former military, law enforcement, or just someone coming back from something hard.

settings.heading: US-made ingredients
settings.text: Sourced and manufactured in the United States. We won't cut corners on where your fuel comes from.

settings.heading: Full label disclosure
settings.text: Every ingredient listed at its full clinical dose. No proprietary blends. No underdosed formulas. Full transparency, always.

settings.heading: 60-day guarantee
settings.text: Try it for 60 days. If Blackout doesn't deliver, you get your money back. Full refund, no questions.

settings.label: Products in the lineup
settings.text: From protein and creatine to joint support, sleep, and omega-3s — one stack for every mission

settings.label: Proprietary blends
settings.text: Every ingredient listed at its full dose on every label we make

settings.label: Guarantee
settings.text: Risk-free trial on every product we sell — no questions asked

settings.quote: "I've been through two knee surgeries. Finding a brand that actually cares about recovery and not just pre-workout hype is rare. Blackout gets it."
settings.name: James R.
settings.title: Marine veteran, tactical athlete

settings.quote: "This brand was clearly built by someone who trains for real. Not some fitness influencer — someone who knows what it costs to keep going when it's hard."
settings.name: Sarah K.
settings.title: Active duty Army, Iron Man competitor

settings.quote: "I appreciate that the person who built this actually lived it. It shows in the products. No fluff, no hype — just what you need to keep training."

settings.quote: "The story behind Blackout is exactly why I trust the products. This wasn't built by a marketing team. It was built by someone who had a real reason to build it."

settings.heading: Train like your life depends on it.
settings.description: US-made supplements built for people who don't quit. Find your stack and get to work.
